titleStmt.title: SII 34.332: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 332. Nāṅgupaṭṭi (Maḍattukkōyil), Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the entrance, right side, to the first prākāra of the Maḍattukkōyil temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 13th year, Mēsha, sudi 14, day 7, Saturday, Uttara-Phālguni = A.D. 1229, April 7, Saturday.

Gift of money (1000 kāsu) by a temple girl called Aḻakiyanāchchi Piḷḷāṇḍār alias Tiruveṇāḻigai-māṇikkam of the temple of Tiruvagattīśvaram-uḍaiya-Nāyaṉār in Vaḍa-Kōṉāḍu in Uṟattūr-kūṟṟam in Iraṭṭapāḍikoṇḍa-chōḻa-vaḷanāḍu for the tirukāppunāṇ wearing ceremony of the deities.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOmāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cOṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya śrī
cuntarapāṇṭiya tēvaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 3 vatu mēṣa nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu patinālāntiya
tiyu cattamiyum canikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ Iraṭṭapāṭikoṇṭa cōḷa vaḷa
ṉāṭṭu Uṟatūr kūṟṟattu vaṭakō nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirupperumāṉāṇṭa nāyanār cittirai
tirunāḷ Āvuṭaiyāraiyum nācciyāraiyum tirukkāppu nāḷ cātti Eḻu
nāṭṭu peruvāyi nāṭṭu ppūr Uṭaiyār tiruvakattī
curamuṭaiya nāyaṉār kōyil tēvaraṭiyāril Aḻakiyanācci piḷḷāṇṭārāṉa tiruveṇāḻikai
māṇikka kūttan Ittanmam Iṉakku vēṇumenṟu ceyakaṭavapaṭikku Āticaṇṭēcuratēvar kan
mikaḷ kaiyil nīrvāttu tirukkāppu nāṇ cātti Eḻuntaruḷa vēṇṭumeṉṟu cantirātittavaṟ cellak ka
ṭavatākap paṇṭārattu Oṭukku koṇṭa kācu 1000 Ikkācu Āyiramum cī paṇṭārattē Oṭukku koṇṭu I
tirukāppu nāṇukku pon Eṭṭu māvum tirumantirakoṭiyum tiruviḷakkeṇṇaiyum tirumun vaḻaṅ
ka pākku veṟṟilaiyum tirukkāppu nāṇ cāttavum parappavum puṇṇiyāka Arici Uḷḷiṭṭa Ari
cik kuṟuṇi nānāḻi Āka Aṭikkīḻparappum nel kuṟuṇiyum Amutupaṭi Arici tūṇi nāḻiyum kaṟiya
mutu Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉaṅkaḷum cāttiyaruḷat tirumēl pūccum ceṅkaḻinīr tiruppaḷittāmamum Ippaṭiyāl vantaṉa
cīpaṇṭārattē Iṭṭu Ittanmam Ivaṟkku cantirātittavaṟ cellakkaṭavatāka Ippaṭi
cammatittu Ikkācu Āiramum cīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukku koṇṭu kalveṭṭikkuṭuttōm Aḻakiya
nācci piḷḷāṇṭāḷāṉa tiruveṇāḻikai māṇikkattukku Āticaṇṭēcuvaratēvar kanmikaḷōm §
Digital edition of SII 34.332 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
